modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be no spelling errors and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to log in to Google Docs.

full_description_text: The user is experiencing difficulties while trying to log in to Google Docs. They are unable to access their documents, which is impacting their work. The issue was reported during a live phone call with the help desk.
short_description: Unable to log in to Google Docs.
description: The user is experiencing difficulties while trying to log in to Google Docs. They are unable to access their documents, which is impacting their work. The issue was reported during a live phone call with the help desk.
